title: GreenKube FinGreenOps Dashboard
description: Comprehensive FinGreenOps dashboard for Kubernetes — CO2 emissions, cloud costs, energy, CPU/memory, network, nodes, grid intensity, and optimization recommendations.

panels.title: Carbon Intensity Score
panels.description: Energy-weighted average grid carbon intensity (gCO₂e/kWh). This is the Sustainability Golden Signal — lower is better. Green = clean grid, red = dirty grid.

panels.title: Sustainability Score
panels.description: Comprehensive sustainability score (0–100, higher is better). Aggregates resource efficiency, carbon intensity, waste elimination, node efficiency, scaling practices, carbon-aware scheduling, and stability.

panels.title: Carbon Intensity Score Timeline
panels.description: Track the sustainability golden signal over time. Identify low-intensity windows (green) ideal for scheduling batch workloads and carbon-aware scaling.

panels.title: Carbon Intensity by Zone Timeline
panels.description: Real-time carbon intensity per electricity zone. Highlights low-intensity windows across different regions for carbon-aware scheduling decisions.

panels.title: Sustainability Dimensions
panels.description: Per-dimension sustainability scores (0–100). Resource Efficiency, Carbon Efficiency (grid intensity × PUE), Waste Elimination, Node Efficiency, Scaling Practices, Carbon-Aware Scheduling, Stability.

panels.title: Sustainability Score Timeline
panels.description: Track the overall sustainability score over time. Higher is better (100 = perfectly optimized cluster).

panels.title: Total CO2 Emissions (gCO₂e)
panels.description: Total operational carbon emissions across the entire cluster.

panels.title: Embodied Carbon (gCO₂e)
panels.description: Total embodied carbon emissions from hardware manufacturing.

panels.title: Total Cloud Cost ($)
panels.description: Total cloud cost across all pods.

panels.title: Total Energy (Joules)
panels.description: Total energy consumption across all pods.

panels.title: Active Pods
panels.description: Number of unique pods currently tracked.

panels.title: Active Namespaces
panels.description: Number of unique namespaces currently tracked.

panels.title: CO2 Emissions by Namespace (gCO₂e)
panels.description: Operational CO2e per namespace over time.

panels.title: CO2 Distribution by Namespace
panels.description: Proportional CO2 contribution per namespace.

panels.title: Embodied Carbon by Namespace (gCO₂e)
panels.description: Embodied CO2e per namespace.

panels.title: CO2 Emissions per Pod (Top 20)
panels.description: Top 20 highest CO2-emitting pods.

panels.title: Cost by Namespace ($)
panels.description: Cloud cost per namespace over time.

panels.title: Cost Distribution by Namespace
panels.description: Proportional cost contribution per namespace.

panels.title: Cost per Pod (Top 20, $)
panels.description: Top 20 most expensive pods.

panels.title: Energy by Namespace (Joules)
panels.description: Energy consumption per namespace over time.

panels.title: Grid Carbon Intensity (gCO₂/kWh)
panels.description: Real-time grid carbon intensity per pod/node.

panels.title: PUE (Power Usage Effectiveness)
panels.description: Current PUE values across pods. Ideal PUE is 1.0.

panels.title: CPU Request vs Usage by Pod (millicores)
panels.description: Comparison of CPU requests vs actual usage.

panels.title: Memory Request vs Usage by Pod (bytes)
panels.description: Comparison of memory requests vs actual usage.

panels.title: CPU Utilization Efficiency by Pod
panels.description: Ratio of CPU usage to request. Values close to 0 indicate waste.

panels.title: Memory Utilization Efficiency by Pod
panels.description: Ratio of memory usage to request. Values close to 0 indicate waste.

panels.title: Network Receive by Pod (bytes/s)
panels.description: Network receive rate per pod.

panels.title: Network Transmit by Pod (bytes/s)
panels.description: Network transmit rate per pod.

panels.title: Disk Read by Pod (bytes/s)
panels.description: Disk read rate per pod.

panels.title: Disk Write by Pod (bytes/s)
panels.description: Disk write rate per pod.

panels.title: Node Inventory
panels.description: All Kubernetes nodes with instance type, capacity, zone, and embodied emissions.

panels.title: Node CPU Capacity (millicores)
panels.description: CPU capacity for each Kubernetes node.

panels.title: Node Memory Capacity
panels.description: Memory capacity for each Kubernetes node.

panels.title: Total Recommendations
panels.description: Total number of active optimization recommendations.

panels.title: Potential Cost Savings ($)
panels.description: Total potential cost savings from all active recommendations.

panels.title: Potential CO2 Savings (gCO₂e)
panels.description: Total potential CO2e savings from all active recommendations.

panels.title: Recommendation Count by Type & Priority
panels.description: Breakdown of active recommendations.

panels.title: Recommendation Cost Savings by Type ($)
panels.description: Potential cost savings per recommendation type.

panels.title: Pods per Namespace
panels.description: Number of tracked pods in each namespace.

panels.title: Namespace Summary Table
panels.description: CO2, cost, energy, and pod count per namespace at a glance.
